title: Swizzels Love Hearts 7" (18cm) "You Grow Girl" Succulent Flowerpot Plant Plush Soft Toy
features: Brighten up somebody’s day with this adorable Swizzels Love Hearts succulent echeveria azulita flowerpot soft toy.
Features the message ‘YOU GROW GIRL’ embroidered onto a Swizzels Love Hearts sweet
This soft toy has been produced using the highest quality and softest fabrics and measures approximately 18cm in height.
Officially licensed Swizzels Love Hearts soft toy.
description: Product Description Here’s a bit of plant positivity with this super-cute and cuddly succulent echeveria azulita flowerpot, that is so proud of you and is always hear to cheer you up with her “You Grow Girl” message. Anyone lucky enough to receive this adorable Swizzels Love Hearts Susie Succulent Flowerpot soft toy that is holding a light blue Love Hearts sweet with the text ‘YOU GROW GIRL’ embroidered inside of it, is sure to absolutely love it...and have a huge smile on their face. This adorable Swizzels Love Hearts Susie the Succulent Flowerpot soft toy has been produced using luxury fabrics, the softest stuffing and is finished with high-quality detailing with her light green rosette leaves, cute little feet and charming smile that is printed on the grey flowerpot body. This Swizzels Love Hearts succulent flowerpot soft toy has been specially made to make sure she gives the best hugs and puts smiles on faces of anyone that cuddles up to her. The Swizzels Love Hearts soft toy collection have been specially designed to help spread positivity and kindness with their fun, sentimental messages and adorable characters that fans of all ages can love and enjoy. This soft toy measures approximately 18cm in height. Officially licensed Swizzels Love Hearts soft toy from Posh Paws. Suitable from birth. Safety Warning Suitable from birth
